executive_summary: Episode 3 focuses on Lori Frantzve (Erika Kirk's mother) and her connections to the Erpenbeck family, who were involved in a massive Ohio/Kentucky fraud scandal in the early 2000s. The episode presents evidence that Richard Erpenbeck was a witness to Lori and Kent's divorce documents, and that Lori has used multiple LLCs with Erpenbeck family members as notaries/incorporators. The episode also traces Erika's timeline through pageants and education, with claims about discrepancies in her narrative.

sub_items.description: Divorce documents for Lori and Kent with Richard Erpenbeck as witness
News clips about Erpenbeck family fraud case
sub_items.transcript_snippet: Erpenbeck served 21 years after pleading guilty to defrauding banks of $34 million.

sub_items.description: LLC filings showing Richard/Donna Erpenbeck as notary/incorporator across multiple businesses
sub_items.transcript_snippet: This is Lori, which feature Richard or Donna Erpenbeck as the secretary, the incorporator, the notary across a 25 year period.

sub_items.description: Deed documents from Marblehead, Massachusetts showing Lori and Kent
Regis University basketball records showing Erika played only 2007-2008
sub_items.transcript_snippet: Regis University still has her basketball stat page up and they're on my side. They say they only have a record of her playing for from 2007 to 2008.

sub_items.description: Erika's 2020 interview where she admits to 8-month hiatus
sub_items.transcript_snippet: I locked myself in my room basically turned into a hermit for about a good eight months.

nodes.name: Candace Owens
nodes.description: Host of the Bride of Charlie investigation series

nodes.name: Erika Kirk
nodes.description: Primary subject of investigation, daughter of Lori Frantzve

nodes.name: Lori Frantzve
nodes.description: Erika's mother, involved in multiple businesses and the Erpenbeck family scandal

nodes.name: Richard Erpenbeck
nodes.description: Witness to Lori's divorce documents, member of Erpenbeck family involved in fraud case

nodes.name: Tyler Bowyer
nodes.description: COO of Turning Point Action, business partner with Lori at Super Feed Technologies

nodes.name: Erpenbeck fraud pattern — Lori LLCs & notaries
nodes.description: Erpenbeck family thread: fraud pattern around Lori’s LLCs and notary/incorporator ties to the same family. Notary testimony names Bill Erpenbeck (Rick Erpenbeck’s brother) re absent signers. Legal/document spelling: Erpenbeck. Video captions/STT often garbled Erpenbeck; treat as caption drift. Richard Erpenbeck appears as witness on related docs.

nodes.name: Erika Timeline Discrepancies
nodes.description: Inconsistencies between Erika's claimed narrative and documented records

claims.label: Richard Erpenbeck Witnessed Divorce Docs
claims.claim: Richard Erpenbeck was listed as the witness on Lori and Kent's divorce documents.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify if Richard Erpenbeck was properly notarized as witness.
claims.transcript_snippet: That witness, his name is Richard Erpenbeck.

claims.label: Unauthorized Notarization Pattern
claims.claim: The divorce documents contained unauthorized notarization where signers were not present (notary: Bill Erpenbeck sometimes asked for notarizations when signers were absent, per ep3 transcript ~12:55–13:16).
claims.investigative_direction: Compare notarization dates with physical presence requirements.
claims.transcript_snippet: She said Bill Erpenbeck sometimes asked her to notoriize documents from the people who supposedly had signed them were not in her presence.

claims.label: Erpenbeck Family Fraud Convictions
claims.claim: The Erpenbeck family was involved in a massive fraud scheme defrauding banks of $34 million.
claims.investigative_direction: Review court records for conviction details.
claims.transcript_snippet: Erpenbeck served 21 years after pleading guilty to defrauding banks of $34 million.

claims.label: Lori LLC Network with Erpenbeck family
claims.claim: Lori filed multiple LLCs using Richard and Donna Erpenbeck as notary and incorporator over 25 years.
claims.investigative_direction: Review Secretary of State records for all LLC filings.
claims.transcript_snippet: This is Lori, which feature Richard or Donna Erpenbeck as the secretary, the incorporator, the notary across a 25 year period.

claims.label: Lori and Tyler Bowyer Business Partnership
claims.claim: Lori Frantzve was put on the board of Super Feed Technologies alongside Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Actions COO.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify Super Feed Technologies board composition.
claims.transcript_snippet: Lori Frantzve, despite being ill, has recently been put on the board of Super Feed Technologies alongside Turning Point Actions COO Tyler Bowyer.

claims.label: Lori and Kent Listed as Rhode Island Couple
claims.claim: Property deeds show Lori and Kent listing themselves as from North Kingstown, Rhode Island.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify if Lori and Kent ever actually lived in Rhode Island.
claims.transcript_snippet: Lori and Kent are listing as having been a couple from Rhode Island.

claims.label: Erika Basketball at Regis Only One Season
claims.claim: Regis University records show Erika played basketball only for the 2007-2008 season, contradicting her claim of two years.
claims.investigative_direction: Obtain official athletic department records from Regis University.
claims.transcript_snippet: Regis University still has her basketball stat page up and they're on my side. They say they only have a record of her playing for from 2007 to 2008.

claims.label: Erika 8-Month Hiatus Claim
claims.claim: Erika claims she isolated herself for 8 months after giving up her crown, seeing only her pastor's wife.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify if college student could realistically have such isolation.
claims.transcript_snippet: I locked myself in my room basically turned into a hermit for about a good eight months. The only person I would see outside of my family was my pastor's wife.

claims.label: Erika Dating History Contradiction
claims.claim: Erika claims she didn't date anyone in NYC for 5 years before meeting Charlie, but evidence shows she had boyfriends during that period.
claims.investigative_direction: Obtain social media records and witness testimony for Erika's dating history 2013-2018.
claims.transcript_snippet: I was here for 5 years. I never dated here.

claims.label: Erika Pageant Timeline
claims.claim: Erika competed in beauty pageants from 2005 through 2012, totaling seven years of pageantry.
claims.transcript_snippet: The reality is that every single year from 2005 through to 2012, Erika was involved in beauty pageants.
